approval.required: production deploy or live backup execution only
approval.granted: local implementation and PR covered by user instruction
approval.notes: Do not execute production backup/restore commands for HON-48.

checks.command: pnpm exec vitest run test/app.test.ts test/ops/backup-cli.test.ts --testNamePattern "secret-safe audit events for folder mutations|secret-safe audit events for cipher mutations|secret-safe audit events for attachment mutations|plans a local D1 and R2 export|plans a local restore"

pnpm exec vitest run test/app.test.ts test/ops/backup-cli.test.ts test/security-docs.test.ts test/release-docs.test.ts --testNamePattern "secret-safe audit events|plans a local D1 and R2 export|plans a local restore|critical security|release notes"
